targets.rawSql:
WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
) SELECT round(coalesce(sum(p.cost_usd), 0)::numeric, 2) AS cost FROM priced p JOIN tasks t ON t.id = p.task_id LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}')

WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
) SELECT count(DISTINCT p.task_id) AS reviews FROM priced p JOIN tasks t ON t.id = p.task_id LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}')

WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
), per_task AS (  SELECT p.task_id, sum(p.cost_usd) AS cost FROM priced p JOIN tasks t ON t.id = p.task_id LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}') GROUP BY p.task_id) SELECT round(coalesce(avg(cost), 0)::numeric, 4) AS avg_cost FROM per_task

WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
) SELECT coalesce(sum(p.prompt_tokens + p.completion_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM priced p JOIN tasks t ON t.id = p.task_id LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}')

WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
), per_task AS (  SELECT p.task_id, p.model,          sum(p.prompt_tokens + p.completion_tokens) AS tokens,          sum(p.cost_usd) AS cost   FROM priced p JOIN tasks t ON t.id = p.task_id   LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id   WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}')   GROUP BY p.task_id, p.model) SELECT model AS "model", count(*) AS "review-runs", round(avg(cost)::numeric, 4) AS "avg $/review", round((percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cost))::numeric, 4) AS "p50 $", round((percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cost))::numeric, 4) AS "p95 $", round(avg(tokens)::numeric, 0) AS "avg tokens", round(sum(cost)::numeric, 2) AS "total $" FROM per_task GROUP BY model ORDER BY "total $" DESC

WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
), per_task AS (  SELECT p.task_id, p.model, sum(p.cost_usd) AS cost   FROM priced p JOIN tasks t ON t.id = p.task_id   LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id   WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}')   GROUP BY p.task_id, p.model) SELECT model AS metric, round(avg(cost)::numeric, 4) AS value FROM per_task GROUP BY model ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Avg cost per review by model (range)

targets.rawSql:
WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
) SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(t.created_at, $__interval), round(sum(p.cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS "cost" FROM priced p JOIN tasks t ON t.id = p.task_id LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
) SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(t.created_at, $__interval), p.model AS "model", round(sum(p.cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS "cost" FROM priced p JOIN tasks t ON t.id = p.task_id LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Estimated review cost per day, by model

targets.rawSql:
WITH priced AS (
  SELECT tr.task_id,
         coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown')           AS model,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0)::bigint    AS prompt_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0)::bigint AS completion_tokens,
         coalesce(tr.prompt_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 0.95 ELSE 0 END)
       + coalesce(tr.completion_tokens, 0) / 1e6 * (CASE coalesce(tr.model, 'unknown') WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'adorsys-reviewer-pro' THEN 3.00 ELSE 0 END) AS cost_usd
  FROM agent_transcript tr
  WHERE tr.role = 'assistant'
) SELECT t.created_at AS "created", coalesce(r.owner || '/' || r.name, t.repository_id::text) AS "repository", t.target_type AS "target", t.target_id AS "number", t.kind AS "kind", t.status AS "status", round(extract(epoch FROM (t.completed_at - t.started_at))::numeric, 1)   AS "duration_s", string_agg(DISTINCT p.model, ', ') AS "model", sum(p.prompt_tokens) AS "prompt_tokens", sum(p.completion_tokens) AS "completion_tokens", sum(p.prompt_tokens + p.completion_tokens) AS "total_tokens", round(sum(p.cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS "cost_usd" FROM tasks t JOIN priced p ON p.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN repositories r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.created_at) AND ('${repo}' = '' OR (r.owner || '/' || r.name) = '${repo}') AND ('${kind}' = 'All' OR t.kind = '${kind}') AND ('${model}' = 'All' OR p.model = '${model}') GROUP BY t.id, r.owner, r.name, t.repository_id, t.created_at, t.target_type, t.target_id, t.kind, t.status, t.completed_at, t.started_at ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 500

list.label: Repository
list.name: repo
list.query: SELECT __text, __value FROM (  SELECT 'All' AS __text, '' AS __value, 0 AS ord   UNION ALL   SELECT owner || '/' || name AS __text, owner || '/' || name AS __value, 1 AS ord   FROM repositories) t ORDER BY ord, __text

list.label: Model
list.name: model
list.query: SELECT __text, __value FROM (  SELECT 'All' AS __text, 'All' AS __value, 0 AS ord   UNION ALL   SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(model, 'unknown') AS __text,          coalesce(model, 'unknown') AS __value, 1 AS ord   FROM agent_transcript WHERE role = 'assistant') t ORDER BY ord, __text
